fields.Name: Salesforce
fields.Description: Salesforce CRM integration for syncing contacts, accounts, opportunities, and custom objects via REST API v61.0

fields.Name: Account
fields.Description: A company, organization, or consumer in Salesforce CRM

fields.Name: Contact
fields.Description: A person associated with an account in Salesforce CRM

fields.Name: Lead
fields.Description: A prospective customer/lead in Salesforce CRM

fields.Name: Opportunity
fields.Description: A sales opportunity in Salesforce CRM

fields.Name: Task
fields.Description: A task or to-do item in Salesforce

fields.Name: User
fields.Description: A Salesforce user (reference only, not writable)
